info.title: RSVP-TE LSP Details
info.description: This module defines a Data Model for reporting the operational state of RSVP TE tunnel.

cnc-host.description: host name or ip address of the target CNC Cluster

cnc-port.description: port number of the target CNC Cluster

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Used by the client to specify the number of list elements to skip before returning the requested set of list entries.  The value is an integer greater than or equal to 0.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Used by the client to specify a limited set of list entries to retrieve. The value is an integer greater than or equal to 1

tunnel-id.description: Tunnel ID associated with the TE Tunnel (leaf)

admin-state.description: Administrative state of the RSVP TE Tunnel (leaf)

oper-state.description: Operational state of the RSVP TE Tunnel (leaf)

rsvp-te-tunnel-type.description: The Crosswork RSVP TE tunnel config type (leaf)

binding-label.description: Binding label assigned to the RSVP TE tunnel (leaf)

pce-controlled.description: If true, the TE Tunnel can be re-optimized by PCE (leaf)

delegated-pce.description: IPv4 or IPv6 address of the delegated PCE (leaf)

sub-delegated-pce.description: IPv4 or IPv6 address of the sub-delegated PCE (leaf)

pcc-address.description: IPv4 or IPv6 address of PCC (Path Compute Client) (leaf)

items.description: IPv4 or IPv6 address of one of the non-delegated PCE (leaf-list)

update-time.description: The time stamp of the most recent update to the RSVP TE Tunnel in the Crosswork database. (leaf)

path.description:
List of paths associated with the RSVP TE tunnel.
Currently, Crosswork only supports a single path. (list)

path-name.description: Path Name for the RSVP TE tunnel (leaf)

path-oper-state.description: Operational state of the RSVP TE Tunnel path (leaf)

metric-type.description: Metric type to optimize for this path (leaf)

metric-value.description: Cumulative metric value for the path (leaf)

computed-time.description: Time stamp when the path was computed (leaf)

ero-hop.description: Explicit Route Object hop list for this path (list)

index.description: Hop index is used to identify an entry in the list. (leaf)

node-id.description: The identifier of a node in the TE topology. (leaf)

rro-hop.description: Record Route Object hop list for this path (list)

index.description: Hop index is used to identify an entry in the list. (leaf)

node-id.description: The identifier of a node in the TE topology. (leaf)

get.summary: Retrieve a RSVP-TE tunnel operational data
get.description: Container for a single RSVP TE Tunnel
